title: 【伊瑟】凶影追缉-菲彼安-参考攻略
summary: 作者-爱赖床的书生攻略对象：菲彼安-破序/恒定（暗/光系）攻略难度：危机噩梦前言：菲彼安是一个双形态boss，分别为恒定-光系的菲比和破序-暗系的菲彼安是智壳的第五个boss，从这里开始，普通难度就正式取消，直接从危机难度开始，所以很多通关了库卢鲁危机的玩家是不能立刻通关危机菲彼安的，数值暂时不能跟
content_json:
[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"作者-爱赖床的书生"}]},{"type":"video","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/video/50364/842268/2025/7/27/463200.mp4","poster":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/video/50364/842268/2025/7/27/248756.png","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"


","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"攻略对象：菲彼安-破序/恒定（暗/光系）   
攻略难度：危机 噩梦

","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"22pt","children":[{"text":"前言：菲彼安是一个双形态boss，分别为恒定-光系的菲比和破序-暗系的菲彼安是智壳的第五个boss，从这里开始，","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"text":"普通难度就正式取消","color":"rgb(0, 176, 240)","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"text":"，直接从危机难度开始，所以很多通关了库卢鲁危机的玩家是不能立刻通关危机菲彼安的，数值暂时不能跟上。因此需要玩家对之前的队伍进行练度提升，主要从配队，等级，源器，智壳，潜能（技能）。

","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"22pt","children":[{"text":"首先是","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"text":"对谛听的技能的养成，需要尽快养成到555，至少也要335","color":"rgb(238, 0, 0)","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"text":"，这样才能在打噩梦菲彼安中有强度，其次在重置炼之后，我们需要养第二个光暗主C，比如","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"text":"夜离、莉拉姆或者弥瑟亚","color":"rgb(238, 0, 0)","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"text":"，书生这边是","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"text":"夜离和莉拉姆","color":"rgb(238, 0, 0)","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""},{"text":"，因为国服这时候可能还没有夜离，如果有的话，换成夜离也是非常好的，这三个光暗主C 都能用很久，泛用性很广。配队上，书生用的 夜离-谛听-克洛斯-梨梨

","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"22pt","children":[{"text":"配队完成后，我们需要对智壳，源器，技能等级进行升级，智壳全队最好30级满级，使用推荐的就好，词条能用就行，源器需要全队金色以上，技能主要是两位主C的技能要高一些，谛听优先，因为不需要消耗“金色技能点”。

","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"22pt","children":[{"text":"最后了解boss情况，boss随着回合行动次数的变多而变强，光系boss增益越多伤害越高，每回合都会加8%的攻击力，暗系boss和光系相反，我们这边减益越多，她越强。就是因为这个，我们必须尽快解决战斗，这次直接加大练度all in boss即可。

","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"22pt","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_822/h_383/50364/2025/8/27/e38ff3c3-7fed-4366-b04c-52e42fc5234bpng","alt":null,"style":{"width":"548px","height":"255px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"

","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"22pt","children":[{"text":"Boss机制：

","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"22pt","children":[{"text":"光系boss

","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"22pt","children":[{"text":"技能一（入界）：单体，偷取增益，增伤，自身每拥有一个增益伤害结果提升5%

","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"22pt","children":[{"text":"技能二（将军）：群体，40%概率偷取15%行动，自身每拥有一个增益伤害结果提升5%

","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"22pt","children":[{"text":"技能三（升变）：回合结束时，附加一层升变（每层提升8%攻击，不可驱散）

","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"22pt","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_855/h_407/50364/2025/8/27/14236915-bb24-4a6a-b921-a888295f6a65png","alt":null,"style":{"width":"570px","height":"271px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"

","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"22pt","children":[{"text":"暗系boss

","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"22pt","children":[{"text":"技能一（争先）：单体，减益，附加-将军（降低10%治疗效果和5%速度），敌方每拥有一个减益益伤害结果提升8%

","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"22pt","children":[{"text":"技能二（将军）：群体，20%概率冰冻，敌方每拥有一个减益益伤害结果提升8%

","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"22pt","children":[{"text":"技能三（升变）：回合结束时，为敌方全体附加-将军（降低10%治疗效果和5%速度）

","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"22pt","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_853/h_409/50364/2025/8/27/0aaf202e-9691-456b-9812-1fa911ef895cpng","alt":null,"style":{"width":"569px","height":"273px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"

","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"22pt","children":[{"text":"一阶段：2个光系棋子+光系boss

","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"22pt","children":[{"text":"棋子1-恒定（光系）：单体，并为全队进化一个减益同时附加攻击、速度、防御上升中随机一项

","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"22pt","children":[{"text":"棋子2-恒定（光系）：单体，并为全队进化一个减益同时附加攻击、速度、防御上升中随机一项

","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"22pt","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_402/h_213/50364/2025/8/27/5c1cb261-8313-49b5-aba6-d20f910034efpng","alt":null,"style":{"width":"268px","height":"142px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_389/h_212/50364/2025/8/27/f69eb8de-f4d9-4532-bfec-2e9de60a9368png","alt":null,"style":{"width":"259px","height":"141px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"

","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"22pt","children":[{"text":"二阶段：2个暗系棋子+暗系boss

","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"22pt","children":[{"text":"棋子1-破序（暗系）：单体，驱散敌方所有增益，并有70%概率附加3回合的攻击、速度、防御下降随机一项

","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"22pt","children":[{"text":"棋子2-破序（暗系）：单体，驱散敌方所有增益，并有70%概率附加3回合的攻击、速度、防御下降随机一项

","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"22pt","children":[{"text":"推荐阵容：谛听（主要输出）+莉拉姆/夜离+蟒蛇+梨梨

","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"22pt","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_425/h_111/50364/2025/8/27/bbb2e3e4-0eb2-4146-84b7-91dd7262f08cpng","alt":null,"style":{"width":"425px","height":"111px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"

","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"22pt","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_389/h_218/50364/2025/8/27/acc390fc-a2e3-4758-b222-6271342c718epng","alt":null,"style":{"width":"259px","height":"145px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_395/h_222/50364/2025/8/27/50e40733-844b-453c-b9bd-513ad3f4ea4epng","alt":null,"style":{"width":"263px","height":"148px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" 

","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"22pt","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_396/h_221/50364/2025/8/27/7bd7dbfe-708b-47d6-bfb6-7c69d998ef98png","alt":null,"style":{"width":"264px","height":"147px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_394/h_221/50364/2025/8/27/f0e5ffd7-c103-46a7-bb8f-ec639dec28dfpng","alt":null,"style":{"width":"263px","height":"147px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" 

","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"22pt","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_395/h_218/50364/2025/8/27/d5b13857-4fde-4a0a-bc2f-c1d8d15ba07fpng","alt":null,"style":{"width":"263px","height":"145px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"

","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"22pt","children":[{"text":"这次通关和其他都不一样，不需要刻意去清除小怪，这个需要我们抓紧机会输出的机会，all in BOSS。





","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]
